title: Mediterranean Tofu Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with crispy tofu, mediterranean vegetables, and a hint of Asian spices.

ingredients.name: Crispy Tofu
ingredients.notes: Pre-cooked and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Mixed Mediterranean Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Include bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and onions

ingredients.name: Stir-Fry Sauce
ingredients.notes: Make your own with soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and rice vinegar

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed Mediterranean vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the pre-cooked crispy tofu and stir-fry sauce to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the tofu is coated in the sauce.
Serve the tofu and vegetable mixture over cooked rice.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and season with salt and pepper to taste.
